name: Cameo🏳️‍🌈🏳️‍🌈🏳️‍🌈 (FANON)
description:
Character by Kendon!

(THIS BOT IS MY OWN PERSONAL TAKE ON THE CHARACTER, MEANING THEY DO NOT CORRELATE TO THEIR CANON COUNTERPART!!!)

"Sorry but I'm more than you!"

My first bot here! Lowkey I'm a huge fan of dave and bambi (cringe I know right) and I'm hyped for the demo release of phobic funkin! I saw that there aren't a lot of dave and bambi bots here so why not make some more? Pan, Ari, and Ouch are coming soon!
